base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_inky_move — a character (playable) from 1980 pac man. Cyan ghost (Inky / Bashful / Kimagure-Aosuke) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, cyan palette. AI: targets tile at vector (Blinky. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cyan ghost (Inky / Bashful / Kimagure-Aosuke) — 2-frame body-wave cycle, cyan palette. AI: targets tile at vector (Blinky→PacMan+2) doubled (erratic)
